# AgentRadar

> AI-first agent application directory. Discover, search, and submit AI agent tools and services.

AgentRadar is an open directory for AI agents, tools, and infrastructure. Both AI agents (via REST API) and humans (via web UI) are first-class consumers.

## API

Base URL: /api
OpenAPI spec: /api/openapi.json
Agent manifest: /.well-known/agent.json

All read endpoints are public (no auth required). Responses are JSON with consistent pagination and error formats.

## Key Endpoints

- GET /api/listings — Search and filter listings (params: search, category, tag, chain, sort, page, per_page)
- GET /api/listings/:slug — Get listing detail
- GET /api/categories — List all categories
- GET /api/tags — List all tags
- GET /api/chains — List all supported chains
- POST /api/listings — Submit a new listing (enters pending review queue)
- GET /api/submissions/search?q=:query — Search submissions by name/slug
- GET /api/submissions/:id/status — Check submission status
- GET /api/health — Health check

## Rate Limits

- Read endpoints: 60 requests/minute per IP
- Submit endpoint: 30 requests/hour per IP

## Agent-Optimized Responses

Append ?format=agent to listing endpoints for minimal JSON:
- GET /api/listings?format=agent
- GET /api/listings/:slug?format=agent

Drops: id, logo_url, short_description, reputation_score, is_featured, view_count, timestamps, chains.
Keeps: name, slug, description, website_url, github_url, docs_url, api_endpoint_url, categories (slugs), tags (slugs).

## Response Format

Default: { "data": [...], "meta": { "page", "per_page", "total", "total_pages" } }
Agent: { "data": [...], "meta": { "page", "total", "total_pages", "has_next" } }
Errors: { "error": "message", "code": "ERROR_CODE" }
